member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.Sample.ConsoleApp.CapitalCityResponse
member.summary: Represents the strongly-typed XML model of the CapitalCity response element.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.Sample.ConsoleApp.CapitalCityResponse.CapitalCityResult
member.summary: Gets or sets the capital city string result.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.Sample.ConsoleApp.ListOfLanguagesByCodeResponse
member.summary: Represents the strongly-typed XML model of the ListOfLanguagesByCode response element.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.Sample.ConsoleApp.ListOfLanguagesByCodeResponse.Languages
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of language objects returned.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.Sample.ConsoleApp.LanguageCodeAndName
member.summary: Holds the language code and its corresponding name.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.Sample.ConsoleApp.LanguageCodeAndName.sISOCode
member.summary: Gets or sets the language ISO code.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.Sample.ConsoleApp.LanguageCodeAndName.sName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the language.
